title: NEET UG 2026 Paper Leak: Nashik Student Allegedly Bought Paper For Rs 10 Lakh, Sold It For Rs 15 Lakh
description: NEET UG 2026: Shubham was detained by the CBI on Tuesday afternoon while reportedly travelling to a temple for prayers. Investigators said he had changed his appearance by cutting his hair in an attempt to evade detection.
